title: pyrethrum minimum
intro: Pyrethrum minimum, also known as Chrysanthemum minimum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant's flowers and leaves contain a compound called pyrethrin, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The medicinal properties of pyrethrum minimum include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and repelling insects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of pyrethrum minimum, such as teas and tinctures, can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and digestive issues.
